title: lathyrus nigricans
intro: Lathyrus nigricans, also known as the black pea or grass pea, is a perennial legume plant native to the Himalayan region. It is a member of the pea family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lathyrus nigricans include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, lower cholesterol, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus nigricans can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions, and it is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
